Container.Name: ChoreBoard
Container.Overview: A self-hosted chore tracking and rewards app for families. Assign chores to kids, track completions, award points, and let kids redeem points for rewards. Includes an admin panel with PIN protection, audit log, and dark/light mode.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the ChoreBoard web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Where the database is stored. Must survive container restarts.

Config.Name: Admin PIN
Config.Description: 4-digit PIN required to access the admin panel. Change this before deploying!

Config.Name: DB Path
Config.Description: Full path to the SQLite database file inside the container. No need to change this.
